global_description: A small, round-bodied bird with a short tail and a compact shape. Its plumage is predominantly brown with intricate patterns of darker streaks and spots. The bird has a slightly curved beak and a short, upright tail.

part_details.body: Round and compact, covered in brown feathers with darker streaks.
part_details.tail: Short, often held upright, with a slightly rounded tip.
part_details.beak: Short, slightly curved, and pointed, suitable for insect foraging.
part_details.wings: Short and rounded, brown with subtle patterning.
part_details.legs: Thin and short, adapted for perching.

spatial_relations: The short tail is positioned upright at the rear of the body.
The slightly curved beak extends from the front of the head.
The wings are attached to the sides of the compact body.
